[[commons:Category:Furufu Shrine]][[ja:舊府神社]] {{Infobox religious building | name = Furufu Shrine | native_name = 舊府神社 | image = Huruhu jinja.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Furufu Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.506608|135.44219}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|ar|سوسانو|azb|سوسانو|bcl|Susanoo|be|Сусанаа|bg|Сусаноо|ca|Susanoo|cs|Susanoo|da|Susa-no-o|de|Susanoo|el|Σουσάνoο|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|eo|Susanoo|es|Susanoo|eu|Susanoo|fa|سوسانو (خدا)|fi|Susanoo|fr|Susanoo|hr|Susano|hu|Szuszanoo|hy|Սուսանո|id|Susanoo|it|Susanoo|ja|スサノオ|ka|სუსანოო-ნო-მიკოტო|ko|스사노오|la|Susano'o|lb|Susanoo|mni|ꯁꯨꯁꯅꯨ-ꯅꯣ-ꯃꯤꯀꯣꯇꯣ|nl|Susanoo|pl|Susanoo|pt|Susanoo|ro|Susanoo|ru|Сусаноо|simple|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|sl|Susanovo|sr|Сусаноо|su|Susanoo|sv|Susanoo|ta|சுசானவோ|th|ซูซาโนโอะ|tr|Susanoo|uk|Сусаноо|vi|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|zh_min_nan|Susanoo|zh|素戔嗚尊|qid=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} }} {{nihongo|'''Furufu Shrine'''|舊府神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * Province|ja|和泉国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11417778|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izumi Province}} ** Series ordinal: 43 ** P155: {{ill|Q135039186|ltq=Q135039186|qid=Q135039186|1=Marokasa Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11611103|ltq=Q11611103|qid=Q11611103|1=Hijiri Shrine (Q11611103)}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|lt=Izumi|ar|إزومي (أوساكا)|ca|Izumi (Osaka)|ceb|Izumi Shi (distrito sa Hapon, Ōsaka-fu)|ce|Идзуми (Осака)|cs|Izumi (Ósaka)|cy|Izumi, Osaka|de|Izumi (Osaka)|en|Izumi, Osaka|eo|Izumi (Osaka)|es|Izumi (Osaka)|et|Izumi|fa|ایزومی، اوساکا|fi|Izumi (Osaka)|fr|Izumi (Osaka)|gl|Izumi, Ōsaka|hy|Իզումի|it|Izumi (Osaka)|ja|和泉市|javoyage|和泉市|ko|이즈미시 (오사카부)|mzn|ایزومی، اوساکا|nl|Izumi (Osaka)|no|Izumi|pl|Izumi (Osaka)|pt|Izumi (Osaka)|ro|Izumi, Osaka|ru|Идзуми (Осака)|sh|Izumi|sr|Изуми|sv|Izumi, Ōsaka|tg|Изуми|th|อิซูมิ (จังหวัดโอซากะ)|tl|Izumi, Osaka|tr|Izumi, Osaka|tt|Идзуми (Осака)|uk|Ідзумі (Осака)|vi|Izumi, Ōsaka|war|Izumi, Osaka|zh_classical|和泉市|zh_min_nan|Izumi-chhī|zh_yue|和泉|zh|和泉市|qid=Q696412|1=Izumi, Osaka}} * {{ill|Q1047117|ltq=Q1047117|qid=Q1047117|1=Izumi Province}} * jinja.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q272993|ltq=Q272993|qid=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181011 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} * 181010 ** P3831: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11504610|ltq=Q11504610|qid=Q11504610|1=Unranked}} * {{ill|Q11123280|ltq=Q11123280|qid=Q11123280|1=Senior Fifth Rank}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6120105006726 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '大阪府和泉市尾井町198', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Furufu Shrine}} [[JA:舊府神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11613492}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name=Furufu Shrine |Image=[[File:Huruhu jinja.jpg|250px]] |Location={{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Izumi City|Q696412|qid=Q696412|1=Izumi, Osaka}} Oi-chō 198 |Coordinates={{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Deity={{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} |Shrine rank={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded= |Main hall= |Other names= |Pilgrimage status= |Annual festival= |Rituals= |Map={{Location map|Japan Osaka|label=Hine Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Furufu (Old Furufu) Shrine''' (ふるふじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}, {{ill|lt=Izumi City|Q696412|qid=Q696412|1=Izumi, Osaka}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, and under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} it was classified as a village shrine. === Enshrined Deity === * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} === History === Although it is an ancient shrine listed in the Engishiki, the exact date of its founding and the originally enshrined deity are unknown. The {{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|qid=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}} records: “On the 7th day of the 5th month of Jōgan 1 (859), mizunoe-inu, the Furufu Deity of Izumi Province was listed among the government shrines. On the 13th day of the 8th month of the same year, hinoe-saru, the unranked Furufu Deity of Izumi Province was granted the Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade.” During the Edo period it was also called “Gozu Tennō Shrine,” and in the 5th year of Meiji (1872) it was ranked as a village shrine. On June 23, Taishō 4 (1915), it was merged into {{ill|lt=Shinoda no Mori Kuzunoha Inari Shrine|Q11386029|qid=Q11386029|1=Shinodanomori Kuzunoha Inari Shrine}} in Kuzunoha-chō, but the following year it was re-enshrined at its original shrine buildings. === Auxiliary Shrines === * Wakamiya Shrine “White Fox Fossil” (enshrined deity: {{ill|lt=Kuzunoha|Q1651785|qid=Q1651785|lt=Princess Kuzunoha|1=Kuzunoha}}) *: It is said to be a stone into which a {{ill|lt=White tiger|Q1072455|qid=Q1072455|1=White Tiger (mythology)}} transformed (or hid) in order to escape from a hunter. Originally this stone was located along the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Oguri Kaidō|1=UNKNOWN}} ({{ill|lt=Kumano Kaidō|Q11568976|qid=Q11568976|1=Kumano Kaidō}}), but in 1947 (Shōwa 22) it was enshrined at Furufu Shrine.[http://www.buccyake-kojiki.com/archives/1064898822.html Furufu Shrine, Oi, Izumi City, Osaka Prefecture – Shrines and the Kojiki] Accessed June 3, 2018 === Access === * 6-minute walk (about 500 m south) from {{ill|lt=Kita-Shinoda Station|Q856975|qid=Q856975|1=Kita-Shinoda Station}} on the JR {{ill|lt=Hanwa Line|Q1154800|qid=Q1154800|1=Hanwa Line}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External Links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www3.ocn.ne.jp/~tohara/izumi-furufu-11.html |title=Shikinaisha of Izumi / Furufu Shrine (Izumi City) |date=20110426110839}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Furufu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Furufu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Furufu Shrine]][[Category:Kanpei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izumi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Son-sha in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Independent shrines]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Izumi, Osaka]] [[Category:History of Izumi, Osaka]]
